channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 18 May: Harare overcast · high 23° / low 11°
item.description: Harare: high 23°, low 11° (overcast) · Bulawayo: high 21°, low 10° (overcast) · Mutare: high 21°, low 12° (overcast) · Gweru: high 20°, low 10° (overcast) · Masvingo: high 22°, low 13° (light drizzle) · Victoria Falls: high 27°, low 16° (overcast) Tsumo yezuva: Chisi hachieri chisingabudi rimwe. (A day of rest doesn’t end without another dawning.) #Zimbabwe #Weather #ZimbabweWeather #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
